headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 11, 2026**
article:
The Los Angeles Angels suffered a 7-2 loss to the Cleveland Guardians, with Travis Bazzana leading the Angels' offense. Joey Cantillo earned the win for the Guardians, pitching 6.0 innings with 4 strikeouts and 0 earned runs. In other action, the Baltimore Orioles edged out the New York Yankees 3-2, securing a crucial win, and the Tampa Bay Rays secured an 8-5 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays.

Several players have been impacted by injuries, including Addison Barger, who has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow inflammation, and Eli White, who has been placed on the 7-day injured list with a concussion. The Detroit Tigers have also made several roster moves, transferring Justin Verlander to the 60-day injured list and placing Kerry Carpenter on the 10-day injured list.

The San Francisco Giants made a trade on May 9, acquiring left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for catcher Patrick Bailey. The Baltimore Orioles also made a trade, acquiring Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies for cash.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Cleveland**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels suffered a 7-2 loss to the Cleveland Guardians, with Travis Bazzana leading the Angels' offense with 1 hit and 2 RBIs. Joey Cantillo earned the win for the Guardians, pitching 6.0 innings with 4 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall to Orioles in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles edged out the New York Yankees 3-2, securing a crucial win. Coby Mayo led the Orioles' offense with a home run and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Blue Jays 8-5**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured an 8-5 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Andrés Giménez leading the charge at the plate. Giménez hit two home runs, drove in five runs, and scored the go-ahead run in a key play.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Shut Out Rangers in Low-Scoring Affair**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a 1-0 victory over the Texas Rangers, with Michael Soroka earning the win after pitching 6.1 innings with 5 strikeouts and 0 earned runs. Geraldo Perdomo led the Diamondbacks' offense with 2 hits, 1 RBI, and a key double that scored the game's only run.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays' Barger Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Toronto Blue Jays right fielder Addison Barger has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow inflammation, effective retroactive to May 10, 2026.

top_news.title: **Giants Acquire Left-Handed Pitcher in Trade**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants made a move on May 9, 2026, acquiring left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for catcher Patrick Bailey.
